title: ABVMU UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET Online Form 2026
short_information: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University (ABVMU), Uttar Pradesh has released the UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET Notification 2026. Those Candidates are Interested to the Following Exam Can Apply Online From 29/04/2026 to 02/06/2026.candidates should read the UPGET 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the UPGET exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, GNM Nursing Courses, information and other types of information and then apply. application_fee: General / OBC / EWS: 3000/- SC / ST / PH : 2000/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking Only. UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET

rows: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University ABVMU UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET 2026 Apply Online Form

Atal Bihari Vajpayee Medical University (ABVMU), Uttar Pradesh has released the UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET Notification 2026. Those Candidates are Interested to the Following Exam Can Apply Online From 29/04/2026 to 02/06/2026.candidates should read the UPGET 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the UPGET exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, GNM Nursing Courses, information and other types of information and then apply.

tables.table_name: UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 31/12/2026 Minimum Age : 17 Years. Maximum Age : NA Age Relaxation Extra as per ABVMU, Lucknow UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET 2026 Admissions Rules.
rows: UP GNM Entrance Test UPGET 2026 Eligibility
10+2 Intermediate with English 40% Marks. 10+2 Intermediate with English 40% Marks in Vocational ANM Course. Registered ANM with Passing Marks. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification.
